altrincham.conditions: Patchy light rain in area with thunder

metrolink: On Sunday 28th June until 10am no trams will operate through Victoria. Rochdale & Bury services will terminate at Victoria. East Didsbury will terminate at Exchange Sq. See TfGM.com for more info

crew_quote: "It’s so humid in here, I could cook a curry just by standing still! If only the weather would sort itself out, we might actually get a decent summer for once!"
